sample_selection: year between 2006 and 2016 (all ACS waves that span DACA implementation)
birthyr between 1975 and 2004 and yrimmig <= 2007 (spans a range around the DACA cohort while ensuring arrival before 2007)
yrimmig - birthyr between 0 and 15 (arrived before turning 16)
perwt > 0, statefip between 1 and 56, empstat in {1, 2, 3}, and uhrswork >= 0 (valid weights and employment data)
treatment_definition: daca_eligible = (birthyr between 1982 and 1996) and (yrimmig <= 2007) and ((yrimmig - birthyr) <= 15)
